title: Sculked Magpie Origin
description: A small mod that adds the posibility to become a Sculked Magpie, a bird possesed that has been possesed by sculk
body:
This mod requires both Origins and Pehkui. Also the origin is sculk related so it won't work on versions prior to 1.19. For the moment it is only for Fabric


The new wings are a creation of the user Rayfire456

For any issues or suggestion is highly recommended to dm me on discord at LunaNight134


Sculked Magpie

When the cave collapsed, a magpie was tapped inside. Now the greedy bird has been infected by sculk spores, turning it into a creature with the desire to spread more spores and find lost treasures

 

Abilities:

 

**+** Caw

With the secondary key you emit a loud shriek that paralyses and blinds every creature who hears it

  

**+** Hidden power

Some small fragments of your wings are falling apart [Save hotbar]; but perhaps you can use two of them to create a new sculk colony

 

**+** Feathered creature

After all you are still part bird meaning that your wings do most of the work for you

 

**+** Sculk senses

You can see every creature in your surroundings by shifting

 

**+** Greedy

By having any ingot or any other shiny ore in your offhand will give you some resistance in order to protect your treasure

 

**+** Chilling in the darkness

Your body has evolved to the deep dark, you are unable to trigger sculk sensors since they are now a part of you, this also makes the warden passive towards you

 

**+** One with the colony

You are part sculk meaning that you can fuse yourself with other sculks to go through them, but you have to do it without any armor on

 

**=** What once was home

You appear in the nearest Ancient City

 

**=** EGG

You lay eggs when you sleep

 

**=** Cute one

You are smaller than the average player and with a tint of blue

 

**-** Living in fear

Most villagers fear you so they won't do any trades with you, instead the iron golem will hunt you down

 

**-** Arrows

You are more vulnerable to arrows

 

**-** Afraid of scarecrows (1.20.1)

As a bird you find people wearing a pumpkin the most horrifying thing ever

 

**-** Cursed being

Wearing, holding, or being hit by anything with a curse enchantment will affect you with Wither II for 3 seconds

 

**-** That smells good

Be careful with the fire, you could get roasted

 

**-** Wet wings

They are heavier if they wet, making flying harder the longer you stay in the water

 

**-** Hunter

Food won't do anything to recover your health, your sculks part demand XP instead

 

**-** Shiny

As a magpie you like shiny things meaning that you prefer to wear armor above iron
